info.title: WebAZ Protocol API
info.description: Auto-generated endpoint inventory (728 endpoints, 17 with full schema). See docs/ for design context.

get.summary: 任何标准 DID resolver(Veramo / SpruceID / KILT / web5 ...)可 GET → 解出 issuer key → 验 Phase 4 凭证签名
集成方 agent fetch 此端点即知"我要做的写需要声明哪个 scope / 哪些写无需 scope / 哪些读受约束"。
RFC-011 §① — agent 可读实体字典(订单状态机 doc=code + 保守公开字段 + 可验证标注)。
RFC-011 §① 目标索引 —— intent → action(②)+ endpoint + MCP 工具 + PWA 页(agent 自路由)。
RFC-011 总入口 —— 集成方 agent 一次 fetch 拿到整份契约导航(按旅程组织,指向各维度 live 端点)。
RFC-011 §⑤ 可验证索引 —— "什么可验 + 怎么验"统一表(护照/锚/AP2/订单链),诚实分级。
GET 全部 admin 列表

delete.summary: DELETE 撤销 admin（root only；不能撤自己；至少保留 1 个 root）

post.summary: For incident response (e.g. a compromised / rogue admin). Atomic. Cannot freeze self or the last root.
Admin: 审核 strike 申诉
P1 fix 4.3: admin 主动 issue strike

get.summary: Admin: 列出待审 strike 申诉

post.summary: ⚠️ 必须在 /:id 之前声明,否则 'triage' 会被 :id 捕获。

get.summary: admin list of UNPUBLISHED drafts (internal, open) + source proposal id
full stored body of ONE unpublished internal draft — for PRE-PUBLISH PREVIEW (publish against visible content).

post.summary: Fail-closed: refuses a published / claimed draft or an already-converted source proposal. Scope = discard only.
PUBLISH a draft → public open task — explicit human/admin action; records the acting admin
验收终态 —— 仅 admin/maintainer(验收=真人,RFC-006 不变量 2;不发奖励/不记信誉)
draft can be built). Fail-closed: refuses a claimed task or a non-published task. Soft-delete (provenance kept).

get.summary: 仲裁员待办:列出所有被举证的临时判责拒单

post.summary: route 只做 auth + gate + 参数校验 + 调 reviewAmlFlag(唯一 review writer,原子改 flag + 写 audit)。

get.summary: GET /api/admin/direct-receive/deferrals?status=pending — ROOT 审批队列(默认全部;可按 status 过滤)。纯读。

post.summary: Passkey purpose_data 绑定【完整审批条款】(deferral_id + reduced_quota_factor + grace_days):签 A 批 B / 改条款一律拒。
POST /api/admin/direct-receive/deferrals/:id/reject — ROOT + 真人 Passkey 拒绝缓交。purpose_data 绑 deferral_id。
当前恒 fail-closed(无 legal-cleared rail → assert 抛 → PRODUCTION_RAIL_NOT_CLEARED)。

get.summary: 只读诊断,不写、无 Passkey(读不授权能力);卖家私密财务,买家/卖家拿不到此 admin 视图。

post.summary: ≠ 退款(不动真钱,只调记账)。purpose_data 绑 seller_id+delta_units+reason。
不碰 buyer wallet/escrow/order/settlement/refund;非买家 escrow/保证金/penalty。本轮无"余额退款"(仅正向预付款登记)。

get.summary: GET /api/admin/direct-receive/fee-prepay-requests?status=pending — ROOT 只读:预充值申请队列(核对到账用)。

post.summary: purpose_data 绑 request_id + seller_id + amount_units + method(把入账金额/对象钉进 Passkey)。原子:approved + recordFeePrepay + 关联 payment。
POST /api/admin/direct-receive/fee-prepay-requests/:id/reject — ROOT + Passkey(不动钱)。purpose_data 绑 request_id。
amount ≤ 当前 available(helper 同事务校验)。append-only + audit。purpose_data 绑 seller_id+amount_units+method+evidence_ref。
Passkey purpose_data 绑定【完整写入内容】(user_id+status+provider_ref+expires_at):签 A 写 B 一律拒。

get.summary: GET /api/admin/direct-receive/product-verifications?status=submitted — ROOT 审核队列(默认全部)。纯读。

post.summary: Passkey purpose_data 绑 verification_id + decision:签 A 用 B / 改结论一律拒。verify = 放行该产品直付(逐品,绝不放行全部)。
含 KYB/sanctions/AML/base-bond/rail clearance 全细节)。只读诊断(不写库、不 flip launch);ROOT 专用,买家/卖家拿不到。

get.summary: GET /api/admin/direct-receive/store-verifications?status=submitted — ROOT 审核队列(默认全部)。纯读。

post.summary: POST /api/admin/direct-receive/store-verifications/:id/review — ROOT + 真人 Passkey 核店铺 + 勾选逐品豁免。

get.summary: 隐私第一：运营财务，仅 protocol admin 可见。

spec §6.2 公示触发原因(透明 — 元规则 #1)

post.summary: accept → 恢复 active(spec §7.2) ;reject → 维持 inactive,公开理由
Useful for ops + testing. The scheduled cron also runs every N hours.

get.summary: P2-5: protocol 权限（区域 admin 看不到全局热钱包）

post.summary: ── admin proposes linking THEIR OWN seat to a contributor account ──

get.summary: admin-seat owner can request/track unlink on their own active claims) ──

post.summary: relationship/request, approval_kind + conflict_disclosure are required (governance honesty). ──
── ROOT: reject an unlink request → claim stays active. Same self-or-related marking discipline. ──

get.summary: self_or_related flags each request the viewing root is a party to → the UI then REQUIRES honest marking. ──
─── Admin payment_methods CRUD（root admin only · 基础设施变更需根权限）─
detail of one request + the requester's live 24h create usage (reviewer context)

post.summary: approve → time-boxed counted grant (self-approval rejected in the store)
reject (self-rejection also blocked by the store's SELF_DECISION guard)

get.summary: 以及"在旧 major consent 上仍 opted-in"= 下次 auto_downgrade cron 的降级候选。

post.summary: NEVER a decision: no auto-publish / auto-reject / hide / reward. A human admin must act explicitly.

get.summary: stored AI suggestions (evidence) for a proposal

post.summary: No auto-publish (draft is internal/unclaimable until an explicit publish); no reward/credit side effect.
admin review (maintainer only): needs_info | rejected | converted — no build_task is created here.

get.summary: Tokenomics 详细数据 + Tier 配置 + 高额榜

post.summary: 注册必须 ref 开关
Admin 手动触发测评评估（测试 + 紧急 + 立即生效）
P0.1: admin 角色提权必须 root；其他角色需 users + scope
L1 分享权限 override：0 auto / 1 强允 / -1 强禁
解除账号登录锁定：清零失败次数 + 解锁
P0.2: preview diff，含 admin 变更 → root only
P0.4: users + scope；suspend admin → root only

get.summary: P1-1: 按 handle / id 任意角色查找

post.summary: Agent 智能下单 — 外链/搜索词输入 → 自动比价 + 推荐 / 锁价

source_url.description: 外站链接（淘宝/京东/Amazon 等）

auto_buy.description: true 时自动下单，false 时仅返回推荐

get.summary: "Connected agents" UI shows so a human can spot stale/unused or busy agents before revoking.

post.summary: ── Issue a grant (human-authenticated). Safe scopes only; risk/never-delegable rejected. ──
(pair 4) Agent retrieves the credential ONCE via PKCE verifier — UNAUTHENTICATED (PKCE-gated).

get.summary: (pair 2) Human reviews the server-generated consent — human-authenticated.

post.summary: (pair 3) Human approves — human-authenticated. Issues the grant (token_hash filled at retrieve).
(pair 1) Agent starts a pairing — UNAUTHENTICATED (agent has no credential yet). Safe scopes only.

get.summary: end-to-end on a brand-new read-only endpoint that touches NO existing route and NO money path.
指纹由 tests/test-contract-fingerprint.ts + docs/CONTRACT-LOCK.json 守住(静默改契约不可 merge)。
结构性事件 + 哈希链字段(验链防篡改),完整 payload 仍走 party-gated /chain。

metering/display surface can never read as a payout promise — facts + attribution only.
